name: sfr-epsilon-greedy
description: SFR epsilon-greedy subagent variant selection: mirrors main agent _select_prompt() pattern. Uses validator/{agent_name}/* namespace for prompt_id. Returns (prompt_id, template_content or empty string). Falls back to non-retired random variant if best is retired. Implements Conductor._select_subagent_variant() with same epsilon decay logic as persona variants (EPSILON_START=0.3, EPSILON_MIN=0.05, EPSILON_DECAY=0.05).

content: SFR template skill preloading: Agent definitions (.claude/agents/*.md) use skills field in frontmatter. Skills execute at spawn time. sfr-variant skill outputs SFR certificate template or empty string. brain-context skill outputs brain_context block. Both use Conductor CLI entry points (--select-subagent-variant, --brain-context). Same mechanism as main agent skill injection (position 10 in build_agent_instruction).

name: implementation-phases
description: SFR implementation phases: Phase 2 adds Conductor CLI methods, 2 skills, SubagentStart hook. Phase 3 updates agent defs with skills field and template instructions. Phase 4 creates SubagentStop hook and subagent_outcomes table. Phase 5 adds analytics section and prism-bug diagnostics. Test fixtures ready. Canopy prompts.jsonl empty, needs 3 validator namespace records.

name: sfr-observe-subagent-outcomes-schema
description: subagent_outcomes table added to brain_engine._init_scores_schema() with columns (prompt_id, validator, recommendation, evidence_count, certificate_complete, certificate_blocked, timed_out, gate_agreed, tokens_used, duration_s, timestamp). _print_sfr_analytics() reads this table in _cmd_analytics() for SFR vs freeform comparison. prism-bug.py collect_sfr_status() queries Canopy (.canopy/prompts.jsonl for /sfr entries), subagent_outcomes table, Conductor._epsilon, and agent defs for sfr-variant skill presence.

name: subagent-sfr-inject-pattern
description: subagent_sfr_inject.py SubagentStart hook reads agent_name from stdin JSON, calls Conductor._select_subagent_variant() for epsilon-greedy SFR template selection (validator/* namespace) and _subagent_brain_context() for role-filtered Brain context, outputs {hookSpecificOutput: {additionalContext: '...'}} for injection. Fails silently (exit 0). _save_subagent_prompt_id() writes to .prism/brain/subagent_variants/<agent_name> for SubagentStop recorder.

name: sfr-implementation-architecture
description: SFR integration uses SubagentStart additionalContext for injection (not preloaded skills — CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT fails in skill markdown). SubagentStart hook outputs {hookSpecificOutput: {additionalContext: template+brain}}. SubagentStop hook enforces certificate completion (exit 2 blocks, max 2x). 3 certificate templates in agents/templates/, 3 Canopy variants in validator/* namespace. Epsilon-greedy selection via _select_subagent_variant(). subagent_outcomes table tracks per-run metrics.
